pages.name: Home
pages.description: Homepage introducing the daycare and providing quick access to core tasks.
primary_functions: Highlight primary actions such as finding a program, scheduling a tour, viewing tuition, events, and teacher information
Provide shortcuts to key flows like Find a Program, Schedule a Tour, Tuition Calculator, Events, and Parent Resources
Surface featured programs, upcoming family events, and testimonials for trust-building

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click primary homepage CTA 'Find a Program'
Click secondary homepage CTA 'Schedule a Tour'
Click homepage link or card for 'Tuition & Schedules'
Click homepage link or card for 'Our Teachers'
Click homepage link or teaser for upcoming events
Click homepage link or card for 'Parent Resources & FAQs'

access_methods.description: Main navigation entry 'Home'
Users can land directly on the homepage via the root URL

pages.name: Programs & Finder
pages.description: Searchable and filterable list of all childcare programs.
primary_functions: Allow users to filter programs by age group (e.g., infants, toddlers_2_3, preschool_3_5), schedule type (full-time, half-day, full-day), campus, ZIP code radius, and tuition range
Provide a ZIP code and distance search (e.g., within 5 miles of 94105) combined with schedule and price filters
Offer sorting options such as Price: Low to High to find the cheapest matching program
Display program result cards with key details and actions to view program details or select for comparison
Provide pre-filtered views for specific age groups (e.g., Preschool 3–5 years) when accessed with query parameters

incoming_params.description: Controls default layout or mode, e.g., 'find_program', 'list', or 'map'
Preselected AgeGroupOption.code filter, e.g., 'preschool_3_5'
Preselected campus filter to show programs at a specific campus
ZIP/postal code to use as the center point for distance filtering
Maximum distance in miles from the given postal_code (e.g., 5)
Comma-separated list of schedule_type filters, e.g., 'full_time_5_days,half_day'
Upper bound for monthly tuition filter, e.g., 1500
Initial sort option, e.g., 'price_low_high', 'distance_near_far'

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a program result card
Click 'Compare selected' after checking two or more programs

access_methods.description: Header links 'Programs', 'Find a Program', and 'Preschool (3–5 years)' point here (with optional query parameters)
Filters and sort order can be deep-linked via query parameters

pages.name: Program Detail
pages.description: Detailed page for a specific program including schedule, tuition, and enrollment options.
primary_functions: Show full program information including age range, campus, schedule options, monthly/annual tuition, and availability status
Allow users to start the enrollment process via a prominent 'Start Enrollment' button for the selected program
Provide a 'Join Waitlist' button for programs or schedules that are full, opening an inline waitlist form
Collect basic waitlist information such as child name and desired start month, and show a brief summary/confirmation on completion

incoming_params.description: Program.id whose details should be displayed

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Schedule a tour at this campus' from the program detail
Click 'Back to all programs at this campus'

access_methods.description: Accessed via program_detail.html?id={programId} from program listings or comparisons

pages.name: Program Comparison
pages.description: Side-by-side comparison view of selected programs.
primary_functions: Display selected programs in a side-by-side table including schedule type (half-day vs full-day), age group, campus, and annual tuition
Help users visually compare costs and features to identify the cheaper or better-fitting program
Provide 'Join Waitlist' and/or 'Start Enrollment' buttons under each compared program, enabling direct action on the preferred option
Preserve key filters/context so users can return to the program list without losing their previous search settings

incoming_params.description: Comma-separated list of Program.id values selected for comparison

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a compared program name to see its full detail page
Click 'Back to search results' from the comparison view

access_methods.description: Accessed via program_compare.html?program_ids={id1,id2} after selecting programs to compare

pages.name: Schedule a Tour
pages.description: Booking page for in-person and virtual tours at any campus.
primary_functions: Let users choose visit type (e.g., In-person tour) and select a campus such as Downtown Campus from a dropdown
Provide a date picker limited to available days, allowing selection of weekdays within specific date ranges (e.g., June 10–20)
Offer a time dropdown with available windows (including weekday morning slots like 10:00–11:30 AM)
Collect visit details such as number of children, child age, parent/guardian name, and email
Submit a 'Request Tour' or 'Schedule Tour' form and show confirmation or next steps

incoming_params.description: Preselected Campus.id for which the tour should be scheduled
Preselected visit type, e.g., 'in_person_tour' or 'virtual_tour'
Optional preselected tour date in 'YYYY-MM-DD' format

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'View programs at this campus' from the tour confirmation or sidebar

access_methods.description: Header link 'Visit Us' opens the Schedule a Tour page
Campus and visit type can be preselected via query parameters

pages.name: Tuition & Schedules
pages.description: Overview of schedule options and typical tuition ranges with access to the calculator.
primary_functions: Explain available schedule patterns (full-time, 3-day, half-day, extended hours) across age groups
Provide sample tuition ranges or starting prices by age group and schedule
Link prominently to the interactive Tuition Calculator tool for personalized estimates
Answer basic questions about billing (monthly vs annual), discounts, and additional fees

incoming_params.description: AgeGroupOption.code used to focus the overview on a specific age group
Optional Campus.id to show campus-specific tuition notes

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click the 'Tuition calculator' or 'Estimate your tuition' button

access_methods.description: Header link 'Tuition & Schedules' opens this overview page
Age group and campus can be pre-focused using query parameters

pages.name: Tuition Calculator
pages.description: Interactive tool to estimate monthly tuition for custom schedules.
primary_functions: Allow users to select age group (e.g., Infants 0–18 months) for pricing logic
Let users choose specific days of the week (such as Monday, Wednesday, Friday) and set drop-off and pick-up times (e.g., 8:00 AM to 6:00 PM)
Enable users to enter a maximum monthly budget (e.g., $1,000) to see if a schedule fits within it
Calculate and display a tuition estimate along with any notes about what is included
Provide a 'Save this quote' action that opens a form to capture email and quote name (e.g., 'Infant M/W/F extended') and confirm that the estimate has been saved

incoming_params.description: Preselected AgeGroupOption.code for the calculator, e.g., 'infants_0_18'
Optional Campus.id in case campus-specific rates are applied

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Back to tuition overview' from the calculator page

access_methods.description: Accessed via 'Tuition calculator' button from the Tuition & Schedules page
Age group and campus can be preselected for deep-linked estimates

pages.name: Our Teachers
pages.description: Directory of teachers and staff with filters by role, experience, and ratings.
primary_functions: Allow filtering by role/age group (e.g., toddler teachers 2–3 years, preschool teachers) to find relevant staff
Provide an experience filter (e.g., minimum 5 years) and rating filter (e.g., 4.5 stars & up)
Offer sorting options such as 'Rating: High to Low' to surface highly rated teachers first
Display teacher cards with summary info and link to full teacher profiles

incoming_params.description: Preselected teacher role, e.g., 'toddler_teacher' or 'preschool_teacher'
Preselected AgeGroupOption.code to filter teachers by age group taught
Preselected Campus.id to filter teachers by campus
Minimum years of experience filter, e.g., 5
Minimum average rating filter, e.g., 4.5
Sort option, e.g., 'rating_high_low' or 'experience_high_low'

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a teacher card in the results grid

access_methods.description: Header link 'Our Teachers' opens this teacher directory
Filters and sort order can be pre-applied via query parameters

pages.name: Teacher Profile
pages.description: Detailed profile for an individual teacher.
primary_functions: Present detailed information about the teacher, including bio, certifications, years of experience, age groups taught, and parent reviews/ratings
Allow users to mark the teacher as a preferred or favorite teacher using an 'Add to favorites' button
If needed, prompt users to label the favorite (e.g., 'Preferred toddler teacher') and save that preference locally
Show related teachers or programs that match the teacher’s age group or campus

incoming_params.description: Teacher.id identifying which teacher profile to display

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'View all teachers for this age group' from the profile

access_methods.description: Accessed via teacher_profile.html?id={teacherId} from the teacher directory or other links

pages.name: Events & Calendar
pages.description: Calendar and list of family events with RSVP functionality.
primary_functions: Display a month-view calendar and/or list view of events, with navigation controls to move to next month
Provide filters for event type (e.g., Family events), price (Free), day-of-week (Saturday/Sunday), and time-of-day (Afternoon 12–5 PM)
Allow users to click into an event entry to see key details and access an RSVP or Register button
Offer an RSVP form that collects number of attendees and captures confirmation for each selected event
Support repeated RSVP submissions for multiple events without losing chosen filters

incoming_params.description: Month to display, in 'YYYY-MM' format; used when clicking next/previous month
Preselected event type filter, e.g., 'family_event' or 'open_house'
Price filter value, e.g., 'free', 'paid', or 'all'
Comma-separated list of day-of-week filters, e.g., 'saturday,sunday'
Time-of-day filter, e.g., 'afternoon'
Event.id used to open a specific event detail and RSVP panel

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Schedule a campus tour' from an event that promotes campus visits
Click 'Questions about this event? Contact us' from the event detail view

access_methods.description: Header link 'Events & Calendar' opens this page
Month and filter state can be controlled via query parameters

pages.name: Parent Resources & FAQs
pages.description: Central hub for FAQs, guides, and parent support resources.
primary_functions: Provide a searchable FAQ interface with a search field (e.g., to search for 'potty training') and topic filters
List search results showing article titles and snippets, allowing users to click through to full articles
Highlight popular topics such as potty training, daily routines, curriculum, and health & safety
Link to detailed articles (on article.html) and to additional support options such as contacting the center

incoming_params.description: Search query text, e.g., 'potty training'
Comma-separated topic codes to filter articles, e.g., 'potty_training,curriculum'
Optional 'true'/'false' string to restrict results to FAQs only

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on an FAQ or article card in the search results
Click 'Still need help? Contact us' from the resources page

access_methods.description: Header link 'Parent Resources & FAQs' opens this help center
FAQ search queries and topic filters can be driven by query parameters

pages.name: Article Detail
pages.description: Full content page for a specific FAQ or resource article.
primary_functions: Display the full text, images, and related content for a selected resource or FAQ article (e.g., potty training guidance)
Show related articles or topics for further reading
Provide a clear call-to-action such as 'Still have questions? Contact us' that leads to the contact form with a relevant subject preselected
Maintain breadcrumb or navigation back to Parent Resources & FAQs

incoming_params.description: Article.id whose full content should be displayed
Optional article slug for SEO-friendly URLs; used together with or instead of id

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Still have questions? Contact us' from a potty-training-related article
Click on a related article link in the sidebar or footer of the article
Click breadcrumb link back to 'Parent Resources & FAQs'

access_methods.description: Accessed via article.html?id={articleId} or article.html?slug={slug} from search results or other links

pages.name: Contact
pages.description: General contact form and contact details for the daycare center.
primary_functions: Provide a contact form with a subject dropdown including options like 'Curriculum & Potty Training'
Allow users to enter a message (e.g., 'When do you start potty training support during the day?') along with name and phone number
Submit inquiries and display a confirmation or thank-you message
Show general contact information such as phone numbers, email addresses, and campus contact details

incoming_params.description: Optional Article.id to pre-contextualize the contact subject based on the originating article
Preselected contact subject enum value, e.g., 'curriculum_potty_training' or 'general_question'

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Back to FAQs' from the contact confirmation message

access_methods.description: Header link 'Contact' opens this general contact page
Article context and subject can be prefilled via query parameters

pages.name: Newsletter Signup
pages.description: Subscription page for the email newsletter with topic and center preferences.
primary_functions: Collect subscriber information including full name, email address, and ZIP/postal code
Allow users to choose topics or interests (e.g., Monthly Newsletter, Special Events Only)
Provide a preferred center dropdown (e.g., Riverside Campus) so communications can be localized
Let users select child age ranges of interest (e.g., Infants 0–18 months, Toddlers 2–3 years)
Submit and confirm newsletter subscriptions initiated from footer links on any page

incoming_params.description: Preselected Campus.id if the user began signup from a specific campus
Comma-separated newsletter topic codes, e.g., 'monthly_newsletter,special_events_only'
Comma-separated AgeGroupOption.code values indicating children’s age ranges of interest

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Privacy Policy' link shown near the signup form

access_methods.description: Footer link 'Email Newsletter Signup' opens this subscription page
Preferred campus, topics, and age groups can be preselected via query parameters

pages.name: About Us
pages.description: Background information about the daycare center, philosophy, and mission.
primary_functions: Explain the center’s mission, values, educational philosophy, and history
Introduce leadership and provide an overview of campuses and age groups served
Link to related pages such as Our Teachers, Campuses & Locations, and Policies

incoming_params.description: Optional section anchor to scroll to, e.g., 'mission', 'leadership', or 'campuses'

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Meet our teachers' from the About Us page
Click 'View all campuses & locations' from the About Us page
Click 'Read our policies & handbook' from the About Us page

access_methods.description: Footer link 'About Us' opens this page
An optional section parameter can direct users to a specific section

pages.name: Campuses & Locations
pages.description: Overview of all campuses and their key details.
primary_functions: List all campuses (e.g., Downtown Campus, Lakeside Campus, Riverside Campus) with addresses, maps, and contact details
Highlight which age groups and programs are available at each campus
Link to relevant actions such as scheduling a tour at a selected campus or viewing programs filtered to that campus

incoming_params.description: Optional Campus.id to highlight and expand details for a specific campus

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Schedule a tour' on a campus card
Click 'View programs at this campus'
Click 'Get updates from this campus' on a campus card

access_methods.description: Footer link 'Campuses & Locations' opens this page
Campus-specific details can be focused using the campus_id query parameter

pages.name: Policies & Handbook
pages.description: Reference page for center policies, parent handbook, and enrollment guidelines.
primary_functions: Summarize key policies regarding enrollment, waitlists, health and safety, and daily routines
Provide downloadable or viewable parent handbook documents if applicable
Clarify policies related to tuition, schedules, absences, and potty training readiness at a high level

incoming_params.description: Optional policy section to jump to, e.g., 'tuition', 'waitlist', 'potty_training', or 'health_safety'

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Read our full privacy policy' from the Policies page
Click 'Questions about a policy? Contact us' from this page

access_methods.description: Footer link 'Policies & Handbook' opens this page
Specific policy sections can be deep-linked using the section query parameter

pages.name: Privacy Policy
pages.description: Legal page describing how user and child data are collected and used.
primary_functions: Explain what information is collected via forms (e.g., tour requests, waitlist, newsletter, contact) and how it is used
Describe data retention, sharing, and security practices
Provide contact details for privacy-related questions or requests

incoming_params.description: Optional section anchor for topics like 'data_collection', 'cookies', or 'security'

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Contact us about this policy' at the end of the Privacy Policy

access_methods.description: Footer link 'Privacy Policy' opens this page
Specific privacy sections can be targeted using the section query parameter

header_links.description: Homepage with overview and access to all main sections
Overview of all childcare programs with filters
Program search tool to filter by age, location, schedule, and tuition
Pre-filtered program list focusing on preschool (ages 3–5)
Information on tuition ranges and available schedules, with link to calculator
Schedule an in-person or virtual tour at any campus
Browse and filter teacher profiles by age group, experience, and rating
Help center with FAQs and parenting resources
Contact form and center contact information

footer_links.description: Learn about the daycare’s mission, philosophy, and history
View addresses, maps, and details for each campus
Browse all childcare programs and schedules
Understand tuition structures and schedule options
See upcoming family events and RSVP
Review center policies and parent handbook
Read how your data is collected and used
Get in touch with the center
Subscribe to newsletters and special event updates
